name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Creation of Cron Files
notes:
This Building Block detects creation of cron file or files in Cron directories.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research), MSTIC
SIGMA Title: Persistence Via Cron Files
SIGMA Description: Detects creation of cron file or files in Cron directories which could indicates potential persistence.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Creation of Cron Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.File Access Success

when the event matches ((LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.d%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.daily%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.hourly%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.monthly%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.weekly%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'crontabs%') or (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.d/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.daily/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.hourly/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.monthly/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.weekly/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/var/spool/cron/crontabs/%')) or ((LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%cron.allow%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%cron.deny%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%rontab%') or (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%/etc/cron.allow%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%/etc/cron.deny%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%/etc/crontab%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Creation of Cron Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.File Access Success

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.d%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.daily%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.hourly%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.monthly%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'cron.weekly%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'crontabs%') or (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.d/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.daily/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.hourly/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.monthly/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/etc/cron.weekly/%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '/var/spool/cron/crontabs/%')) or ((LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%cron.allow%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%cron.deny%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%rontab%') or (LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%/etc/cron.allow%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%/etc/cron.deny%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%/etc/crontab%')) AQL filter query
